== Notes for [[Item:Q113355|Q113355]] ==

=Gonzalo González=

Varón (1015 - ) Dead

Padre: Conde de Castilla Gonzalo Fernández, n. 970, f. 1011

Madre: Nuña Núñez, f. Dead

===Hijos===

># Salvador González, n. 1032, f. Dead

''in: Solo Genealogia <http://www.sologenealogia.com/gen/getperson.php?personID=I72937&tree=001>''

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
